content: Copy garmentrahaza5 repo to /app (backend + frontend, preserve .env files)
Install all dependencies (backend pip + frontend yarn)
Phase 18B: Andon Panel (operator help request + supervisor notification + SLA)
Phase 18C: Shop-Floor TV Mode (full-screen display, no login needed)
Phase 18D: SOP Inline (work instructions per model×process, operator view integration)
